item.title: On point. Some will be surprised by this gentleman.
item.dc:creator: Cosmicfisherman

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description:
I pass an entrance on the freeway every morning on my way to work. One day I told someone in passing that it feels like I only ever see two cars come on at that entrance at a time and they're always just in time to get in my way. Ever since then it's either been 1 car or 3 cars now.
Yo professuh!
item.dc:creator: stonetemplefox05

item.title: Every third of his guests is gold.
item.description: Amy Goodman and Jon Steward in a real good talk. Amy Goodman, is host and executive producer of “Democracy Now!” and subject of the new documentary "STEAL THIS STORY, PLEASE!" Together, they examine which stories get told and why, discuss the bargain the media makes in trading truth for access, and explore the power ordinary people still possess to organize and fight back — even as attacks on our democracy intensify. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fHonUeO_ePU
item.dc:creator: onushka

1

22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Aaron Ashmore
"Simple pleasures are the last refuge of the complex." - Oscar Wilde So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.**
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: The artists behind the memes
item.description:
Yesterday I made a post on Bluesky ( https://bsky.app/profile/aimeecozza.com/post/3mnfidv7fkk2y ) asking people to please remember the artists who often go uncredited when it comes to memes and inviting people to post the meme artworks with artist credits. A lot of the times their artworks are just ripped from the internet, and even worse, plenty of times artists have their signatures cropped off of obfuscated by emojis, other watermarks, or scribbles! Everything on the internet didn't just come out of nothing, despite what some people might think, so I thought I'd make an Imgur companion post to go with that shows which artists have done what popular memes... Starting with KC Green and the This is Fine dog. https://kcgreendotcom.com/
I GUESS is ALSO made by KC Green. The full comic sure is something https://gunshowcomic.com/367
Galan Pang: https://www.artstation.com/artwork/WXKaE
Diana Franco: https://dianafranco.artstation.com/projects/3mgAE
Jana Heidersdorf: https://janaheidersdorf.com/
Tristan Elwell: https://tristanelwell.com/
JobeeArt: https://bsky.app/profile/jobeeart.bsky.social
Ward Sutton: https://www.instagram.com/wardsutton/
Anya Boz: https://www.anyaboz.com/room-guardian-gallery
Norman Rockwell: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Norman_Rockwell
Anelien/cupcakelogic: https://www.instagram.com/cupcake.logic/
Hannah Hillam: https://www.instagram.com/hannahhillam
Yuko Ota from a guest strip in Questionable Content, written by Ananth Hirsh
Kate Beaton: http://www.harkavagrant.com/index.php?id=213
@nauciflocci: https://www.instagram.com/nauciflocci
CassWArt: https://www.casswomack.com/
False Knees: https://store.falseknees.com/
Angus McBride: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Angus_McBride
Qinni: https://www.instagram.com/qinniart/
Destiny Blue: https://www.deviantart.com/destinyblue/art/Depression-534485738
Lycanium: https://www.deviantart.com/lycanium/art/Loss-468754170

item.title: Republicans again blocked Sen. Ossoff's amendment to prevent insurance companies from denying or delaying needed care.
item.description: “Instead of slush funds for criminals and corrupt ballrooms, let's do something useful. Let's ban insurance companies from denying or delaying medically necessary health care to Americans," Sen. Ossoff said.
item.dc:creator: MEOWnews

item.title: Thursday funnies and things
item.description:
Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or escaping reality, you’ll love following this page!
I love my mom. She’s much smarter than me
It’s not gossip if it’s true
Hmm.
Any form of work communication sucks
Good way to make him annoyed
Under your shirt?
The pros and cons of medieval peasant in head
They’re so waxy too, yet the more you rest them, the more you want them
Certainly not
Hot ham water
I am a better chef because I mash mine up and microwave it first.
How to know you’re spoiling your bougie kids
I would
The second looks like an outfit a toddler would pick out
Which part of America? Because there’s some places where Americans are really rude.
Both? Both is good.
Yay!
Geez, I thought I would never be gullible but the older I get, the more stupid I realize I am
Eternally crazy
Says a little guy riding a snail. That’s magical.
Did you mean to say ‘awesome’?
Easy way to deter turds
Yes. And apparently you’ve failed earlier tests too.
I’ll bet he thought he’d fine the golden goose
This. This is the reason to have kids.
Good father
Did he really know what he’d said though?
I also felt whiplashed
That’s just wrong
Why not? That sounds like true love to me.
Wow. Sounds like the beginning of a kinky romance novel.
That’s a keeper
Are you a prophet?
For real, they’re always nice and seem happy to be there.
Is this really a thing to start worrying about?
I was scared before, but now I have another reason to be scared
Seems like it
Hmm cute worlds
OMG
I never heard of it before Covid. It’s nuts but also, doesn’t seem like fun tv.
Is this what happens in movies from other countries?
Very serious
Ah sleep
If my floor was lasagna, I would freak
Jesus, take the world. Gas is outrageous
Sounds right to me
My cat is named Sylvia so I think it’s funny
Umm, okay. Weird kink but whatever floats your boat
It’s very annoying
item.dc:creator: GigglySprinkleCupcake

item.dc:creator: LockedAndKnotted

item.title: This is what sportsmanship looks like. ?​Right after an intense battle in the ring, Ukrainian legend Oleksandr Usyk didn't just celebrate his victory—he immediately lifted up a defeated Daniel Dubois.​"It’s boxing. It’s not ballet, it’s not dancing... You
item.description: Right after an intense battle in the ring, Ukrainian legend Oleksandr Usyk didn't just celebrate his victory—he immediately lifted up a defeated Daniel Dubois. "It’s boxing. It’s not ballet, it’s not dancing... You are young. You can dream." In a sport as brutal and unforgiving as boxing, seeing this level of respect and mentorship between elite competitors is exactly why we love the game. Usyk reminds us all that inside the ring, they are warriors, but outside of it, they are brothers. Drop a ❤️ if you respect this legendary mindset!
item.dc:creator: mocosoft

item.title: We're getting him microchipped.
item.description:
I'm still upset with my husband, lol. (Edit: I have apologized to him for getting so upset and he has apologized for leaving the window open) I was crying and shaking after he told me the window was open all night. It's a second story window so he assumed RC wouldn't jump out if he came upstairs, since he's been downstairs the whole time we've had him, except for the one time I found him in the entryway one morning. Once I went outside I told my dogs, "Where's RC? Find RC!" and my dog, Zelda, clambered over all the rakes and shovels behind the shed, a place the dogs wouldn't usually go because there's no space to walk, and led me straight to him. I was outside for maybe two to three minutes before finding him.
Back in his favorite spot :) He is going to be an indoor cat as long as that window isn't opened again! (which it won't be) Edit: We took him to the vet yesterday and got him all vaccinated up. We got his blood tested for FeLV and FIV and they came back negative. They say he is 2-4 years old and very healthy!
item.dc:creator: Zinfandella
